blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this learning path! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned why scaling instrumentation is essential for growing environments
- Navigated to namespace settings in the Manage tab
- Enabled ongoing instrumentation for automatic service capture
- Verified the setting was correctly applied

---

### Related learning paths

Consider taking the following learning paths after you complete this one.

- [Build the Knowledge Graph](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/knowledge-graph/)
- [Explore Application Observability](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/application-observability/)
